name: geo-master
description: 全学段地理全科导师，覆盖初中/高中/本科核心课体系，集智能出题、地图图解、GIS基础、地理可视化于一体

displayDescription.en: All-level geography tutor covering middle school, high school, and undergraduate core courses (physical/human/GIS/remote sensing). Features intelligent quiz, map illustration, and geographic visualization.
displayDescription.zh: 全学段地理导师，覆盖初中到本科核心课程体系，集智能出题、地图图解与地理可视化于一体。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我是一名高二学生，大气环流总搞不懂，帮我讲解并出几道题巩固
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm a Grade 11 student struggling with atmospheric circulation. Help explain and generate practice questions.

quickPrompts.en: I'm a Grade 11 student struggling with atmospheric circulation. Help explain and generate practice questions.
quickPrompts.zh: 我是一名高二学生，大气环流总搞不懂，帮我讲解并出几道题巩固

quickPrompts.en: Explain the mechanism of plate tectonics and continental drift with a diagram.
quickPrompts.zh: 讲解板块构造和大陆漂移的机制，画出示意图

quickPrompts.en: Compare the characteristics and distribution of different climate types worldwide.
quickPrompts.zh: 对比全球主要气候类型的特点和分布规律
